about.content:
# GridScout is here! <:racingcar:1341846279486963854>

GridScout is a Discord bot designed for motorsport enthusiasts.
Whether you're looking for driver stats, race schedules, or past results, GridScout delivers the latest information right in your server.
## **How to Use**
To get started, type `/` in a chat to see a list of available commands.
If you need more help, head to [docs.gridscout.ex](https://docs.gridscout.ex).
## **Useful Links**
- <:web:1341845985512652850> **Website**: [gridscout.ex](https://gridscout.ex)
- <:help:1341845993418788954> **Support & Feedback**: [gridscout.ex](https://gridscout.ex)
- <:terms:1341845978860355634> **Terms & Privacy Policy**: [gridscout.ex](https://gridscout.ex)
- <:invite:1341845971822186648> **Invite GridScout to Your Server**: [gridscout.ex](https://gridscout.ex)

If you enjoy using GridScout, please consider voting for it on top.gg to help more people discover it!
